'''鈭歨-m-n-th''' ('''kahamnethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:becack|becack]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-m-n-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:becack|becack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-m-n-th
|-
! Lemma
| kahamnethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
